productDisplayName: Lino Perros Women Solid Red Handbag
description: Urban chic has a new extension of its style, with this bold red handbag from lino perros. Style and practicality combine in this stylish handbag, which you can pair with casual and formal ensembles. Height: 24 cmWidth: 31 cmDepth: 12 cm Made of Leatherette for durability and style Two short handles for carrying ease One main zippered compartment Fabric lining Zippered separator and a zippered compartment inside the main compartment Zippered compartment on the front with mobile and organizer pouches Branded zippers Brand badge on the front Metal studs on the handle extension for style Zippered compartment at the back Weave detailing along the sides of the bag Care Wipe with clean, damp cloth to remove dirt
